entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum affected by downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease affecting pearl millet caused by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where on-farm surveys were conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research surveys were conducted

entities.name: VIRULENCE DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in the ability of pathogen isolates to cause disease

entities.name: VIRULENCE INDEX
entities.description: A calculation based on percent disease incidence and latent period to determine quantitative virulence

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine similarity among pathogen isolates

entities.name: AVERAGE LINKAGE METHOD
entities.description: The specific method used within cluster analysis to determine similarity

entities.name: SG 492
entities.description: A highly virulent isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Aligarh

entities.name: SG 510
entities.description: A highly virulent isolate of Sclerospora graminicola from Badaun

entities.name: ALIGARH
entities.description: The location from which isolate Sg 492 was collected

entities.name: BADAUN
entities.description: The location from which isolate Sg 510 was collected

entities.name: GREENHOUSE SCREENING
entities.description: The process of testing breeding lines for resistance or susceptibility

entities.name: PEARL MILLET BREEDING LINES
entities.description: Lines of pearl millet used in greenhouse screening for virulence

entities.name: LINE 7042S
entities.description: A highly susceptible pearl millet line used to establish pathogen isolates

entities.name: HOST DIFFERENTIAL LINES
entities.description: A set of lines used to characterize the virulence diversity of pathogen isolates
